mnemonics: Mary's Piggy Party- Scatter People Laughing
Mike's Pizza Party- Line People Hanging
Maria's Pizza Hut- Histograms Bring Insights To You
Mickey's Pizza Makes- Box Plots Right Away
Mike's Pizza Machines- Bars Plot Perfectly
keyPoints: Exploratory Data Analysis is key to understanding data
Main graphical packages in R are 'ggplot2', 'lattice', 'grid', 'ggrepel' and 'plotly'
Pie charts are used to show proportion of categories
Scatter plots are used to visualize relationship between variables
Line plots are used to visualize trend over time
Histograms are used to show distribution of a single variable
Box plots are used to show distribution of a single variable
Bar plots are used to compare categorical variables
Other graphical elements are 'heatmap', 'network', and 'bubble charts'
